name: Notion URL Tracker — Read Later
description: One-click save the current page to a Notion read-later database (works with the Link Tracker template): keeps the URL, extracts readable article text, supports tags, status, favourite/archive, multiple profiles, quick-saves, and selection capture.

_execute_action.description: Open the Save to Notion popup

instant-save.description: Instantly save the current page to Notion (defaults)
